requirement_topic.en: IRAM / IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 Project Specifications

summary.en: IEC 62619:2022 and the IEC 62933 series are internationally used references for industrial lithium battery safety and electrical energy storage systems. In Argentina, IRAM participation or local project specifications may point to IEC-family evidence, but these standards should be treated as voluntary or project-specific unless an Argentine regulation, tender, contract, utility requirement, insurer, lender, or engineer of record makes them mandatory for the product or installation.
summary.zh: IEC 62619:2022和IEC 62933系列是工业锂电池安全及电能存储系统常用的国际参考标准。在阿根廷，IRAM参与或本地项目技术规格可能指向IEC体系证据，但除非阿根廷法规、招标文件、合同、公用事业要求、保险方、融资方或责任工程师将其作为产品或安装的强制要求，否则应视为自愿或项目特定要求。
summary.zht: IEC 62619:2022和IEC 62933系列是工業鋰電池安全及電能儲存系統常用的國際參考標準。在阿根廷，IRAM參與或本地項目技術規格可能指向IEC體系證據，但除非阿根廷法規、招標文件、合約、公用事業要求、保險方、融資方或責任工程師將其作為產品或安裝的強制要求，否則應視為自願或項目特定要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 (and IRAM-IEC 62619 where IRAM has formally adopted the IEC text — confirm adoption status with IRAM)
IEC 62933 series (and IRAM-IEC 62933 series where IRAM has formally adopted — confirm adoption status with IRAM)
IRAM standards route where adopted or specified by the project, tender, insurer, or authority

summary.en: China BESS packages commonly cite GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 for lithium cells and batteries used in electrical energy storage. They are useful China-origin evidence but are not one-for-one substitutes for IEC clause evidence when an Argentina buyer, EPC, lender, insurer, or engineer asks for IEC 62619 or IEC 62933 documentation.
summary.zh: 中国BESS资料通常引用GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023作为电能存储用锂电池及电池组依据。它们是有用的中国来源证据，但当阿根廷买方、EPC、融资方、保险方或工程师要求IEC 62619或IEC 62933文件时，不能作为IEC条款证据的一一替代。
summary.zht: 中國BESS資料通常引用GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023作為電能儲存用鋰電池及電池組依據。它們是有用的中國來源證據，但當阿根廷買方、EPC、融資方、保險方或工程師要求IEC 62619或IEC 62933文件時，不能作為IEC條款證據的一一替代。

gap.en: Prepare a clause map from Chinese cell, module, rack, BMS, PCS, EMS, enclosure, HVAC, and fire-mitigation evidence to the IEC clauses requested by the Argentina project. Confirm whether the contract requires IRAM-adopted standards, IEC originals, Spanish reports, local professional sign-off, or third-party test reports.
gap.zh: 应将中国电芯、模组、电池架、BMS、PCS、EMS、箱体、暖通和消防缓解证据映射至阿根廷项目要求的IEC条款，并确认合同是否要求IRAM采标、IEC原标准、西班牙语报告、本地专业签署或第三方测试报告。
gap.zht: 應將中國電芯、模組、電池架、BMS、PCS、EMS、箱體、暖通和消防緩解證據映射至阿根廷項目要求的IEC條款，並確認合約是否要求IRAM採標、IEC原標準、西班牙語報告、本地專業簽署或第三方測試報告。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary or project-specific unless incorporated by Argentine regulation, tender, permit condition, grid requirement, contract, lender requirement, insurer requirement, or engineer-of-record decision
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory where its Chinese scope applies; GB/T 36276-2023 is recommended unless made mandatory by procurement, project approval, or another instrument

source.title: IEC 62619:2022 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes – Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries, for use in industrial applications

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC evidence is often expected in bankable Argentina BESS projects, but mandatory status depends on the exact Argentine instrument or contract. Confirm requested clauses and editions before relying on China GB reports.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 可融资的阿根廷BESS项目通常会期待IEC证据，但强制性取决于具体阿根廷文件或合同。依赖中国GB报告前，应确认所需条款和版本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 可融資的阿根廷BESS項目通常會期待IEC證據，但強制性取決於具體阿根廷文件或合約。依賴中國GB報告前，應確認所需條款和版本。
